MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Joyce Monroe is present.
Attorney James Millar appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Lawrynce Wallace and Nayah Wallace are present.
Attorney Joyce Jordon representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-28-2013 is vacated.
